_synthetic: M5 quantity-fix regression fixture — HAND-AUTHORED, not a real capture. Mirrors the confirmed in-game bug (docs/progress.md 'First live run'): the player owns CHAINSAW x8 but only ONE each of DIGGER / SPITTER / MINE / BOMB / NUKE / BURST_3 / DAMAGE / ADD_TRIGGER. DIGGER is type-0 mana-0 — the CHEAPEST projectile — so pre-fix the spammer/multicast templates filled the deck with ~capacity DIGGER (the reported '~15 DIGGER when I own 1'). The chassis capacity (10) exceeds the 8 owned CHAINSAW, so a correct spammer must spill to other projectiles rather than repeat past ownership. Used by generate.test.ts to assert no generated deck exceeds ownedCounts.
